mapper.update: UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_2#Sql015a */ BB_ACCEPT O SET O.BB_QUANTITY = TO_NUMBER(#{req.quantity}), O.BB_PRICE = DECODE(#{req.price}, null, null, TO_NUMBER(#{req.price})), O.BB_DISCOUNT = DECODE(#{req.discountRate}, null, null, TO_NUMBER(#{req.discountRate})), O.BB_SEQ = TO_NUMBER(#{req.investorAttributeValue}), O.BB_INVESTOR_ATT_NAME = #{req.investorAttributeName}, O.BB_REMARK = #{req.bbRemark}, O.BB_STRIKE_PRICE = NVL(#{req.marketOrder}, 0), O.BB_UPDATE_DATE = #{req.sysDate}, O.BB_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{req.userId}, O.BB_UPDATE_SECTION_ID = #{req.sectionId}, O.BB_UPDATE_SECTION_NAME = #{req.branchName}, O.BB_UPDATE_USER_NAME = #{req.userId} WHERE O.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND O.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}) AND O.BB_BRANCH_CODE = UPPER(RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ')) AND TO_NUMBER(O.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber}) AND (TO_CHAR(O.BB_UPDATE_DATE, 'yyyy/MM/dd hh24:mi:ss') = #{req.bbCreateDate} OR O.BB_UPDATE_DATE IS NULL）
mapper.delete: DELETE /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_2#Sql015b */ FROM SR_ACCEPT P WHERE P.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND P.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}) AND P.BB_BRANCH_CODE = UPPER(RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ')) AND TO_NUMBER(P.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})
mapper.update: UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_2#Sql015c */ SR_ACCEPT Q SET Q.BB_QUANTITY = TO_NUMBER(#{req.quantity}), Q.QUANTITY_SAIRYOU = TO_NUMBER(#{req.discretionQuantity}), Q.CHOSE_REASON = #{req.selectReason}, Q.SR_UPDATE_DATE = #{req.sysDate}, Q.SR_UPDATE_USER_ID = #{req.userId} WHERE Q.BB_PRODUCT_CODE = #{req.brandCode} AND Q.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM = TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}) AND Q.BB_BRANCH_CODE = UPPER(RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ')) AND TO_NUMBER(Q.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) = TO_NUMBER(#{req.accountNumber})
mapper.insert: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0204_02-02_2#Sql015d */ INTO SR_ACCEPT I ( I.BB_PRODUCT_CODE, I.BB_PRESENTATION_FROM, I.BB_BRANCH_CODE, I.BB_ACCOUNT_NUMBER, I.BB_QUANTITY, I.QUANTITY_SAIRYOU, I.CHOSE_REASON, I.SAIRYOU_ALLO_QUANTITY, I.SR_CREATE_DATE, I.SR_UPDATE_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{req.brandCode}, TO_NUMBER(#{req.bookBuildingPresentationFrom}), UPPER(RPAD(#{req.butenCode}, 4, ' ')), LPAD(#{req.accountNumber}, 7, 0), TO_NUMBER(#{req.quantity}), DECODE(#{req.discretionQuantity}, null, null, TO_NUMBER(#{req.discretionQuantity})), #{req.selectReason}, NULL, #{req.sysDate}, #{req.userId} )
